summary: This release delivers advanced role management with entity-based permissions and user-level restrictions, comprehensive DC09 alarm forwarding features with encryption support, critical platform regression fixes, and multi-monitor Talos-Salvo integration for enhanced operator workflows.

items.title: Role Creation with Entity and Permission Assignment
items.description: Admins can create roles with name, entity assignments, and privilege configurations in a single unified editor. Role data persists correctly across login sessions with no data loss.

items.title: Role Creation Performance
items.description: Role creation and save operations complete within acceptable performance thresholds with no noticeable UI delay.

items.title: Duplicate Role Name Validation
items.description: System prevents creation of duplicate role names within the same tenant. Validation is case-insensitive. Same role names are allowed across different tenants.

items.title: Permission Check Performance
items.description: Permission validation executes within defined SLA (under 100ms). System handles concurrent permission checks under load without degradation or timeouts.

items.title: Permission Enforcement Without Leakage
items.description: Permissions are enforced accurately after role modifications. No cached stale permissions remain. Changes apply immediately without manual cache clearing.

items.title: Role Cloning
items.description: Admins can clone existing roles including all entities and privileges. Cloned roles are independent - modifications to clones do not affect originals.

items.title: Hierarchical Entity Selection
items.description: Entity tree supports parent-child selection behavior. Selecting parent auto-selects all children. Deselecting parent deselects all children. Partial child selection shows indeterminate parent state.

items.title: Dynamic Privilege Filtering by Entity
items.description: Privilege list filters dynamically based on selected entities. Only relevant privileges are visible. Privileges update in real-time when entity selection changes.

items.title: Privilege Category Organization
items.description: Privileges should be grouped logically in categories with clear labeling and no duplicates across categories. Currently failing - categories are not organizing privileges clearly.

items.title: Invalid Privilege-Entity Combination Prevention
items.description: System blocks save when invalid privilege-entity combinations exist. Previously selected privileges are removed or validated when entity selection changes.

items.title: Privilege Selection Performance
items.description: Multiple privilege selections complete smoothly without lag. Rapid entity switching updates privilege list correctly without JS errors or state corruption.

items.title: Concurrent Role Operations
items.description: System handles concurrent admin operations without data corruption, race conditions, or version conflicts. Proper optimistic locking enforced.

items.title: Tenant Isolation for Roles and Privileges
items.description: Roles and privileges are strictly isolated per tenant. No cross-tenant visibility or privilege leakage.

items.title: Role Assignment from User Profile
items.description: Admins can assign roles to users from user profile. Assignment completes within 5 seconds. Assigned roles grant correct permissions immediately.

items.title: Bulk Role Assignment to Groups
items.description: Admins can assign roles to groups. All group members receive the role. Bulk assignment completes within 5 seconds for groups of 50+ users.

items.title: Effective Permissions View
items.description: Admins can view user's effective permissions showing direct roles, group roles, and merged permissions. Loads within 10 seconds. Correct merge logic and conflict handling.

items.title: Role Removal from Groups
items.description: Removing role from group immediately revokes access from all members. Effective permissions update dynamically.

items.title: Multi-Group Role Deduplication
items.description: Users belonging to multiple groups with same role receive no duplicate assignment. Clean permission calculation.

items.title: Effective Permissions Performance Under Large Dataset
items.description: Effective permissions calculation completes within 10 seconds even for users with 10+ groups and 20+ roles.

items.title: Entity-Specific Permission Overrides
items.description: Admins can add deny or grant overrides for specific privileges on specific entities. Overrides are displayed in a clear table format and can be added or removed immediately.

items.title: Deny Override Precedence
items.description: Deny overrides should take precedence over global grants. Currently failing - deny on Entity A should block edit while allowing edit on Entity B.

items.title: Override Validation and Performance
items.description: System prevents duplicate overrides. Override on deleted/invalid entity shows validation error. Large override sets (50+) load without performance degradation.

items.title: Exclude Privilege from Individual User
items.description: Admins can exclude specific privileges from individual users without creating new roles. Other users in same role are unaffected. Exclusions work independently.

items.title: Restriction Performance and Persistence
items.description: Restrictions apply within approximately 20 seconds. Restoration completes within approximately 10 seconds. Restrictions persist across logout/login cycles.

items.title: Restriction Audit Logging
items.description: Audit logs capture restriction events with admin name, timestamp, affected user, excluded privilege, and reason.

items.title: Restricted User Clear Messaging
items.description: Restricted users receive clear messages explaining restrictions with contact/reference info, not generic Access Denied errors.

items.title: Invalid Exclusion Prevention
items.description: System prevents excluding privileges the user does not have via their assigned roles.

items.title: DC09 Encryption Key Support
items.description: Add optional Encryption Key field to Site Creation and Edit forms. Support encrypted and unencrypted DC09 alarm transmission based on key configuration. Store encryption key securely with masked display.

items.title: Configuration Confirmation View
items.description: Display confirmation view after successful CMS and site configuration. Summary includes configured CMS, tenant-level settings, site-level DC09 account mapping, and encryption status.

items.title: DC09 Alarm Forward Log Section
items.description: Add DC09 Alarm Forward Log section to Device Dashboard for devices belonging to sites that forward alarms using DC09. Hide section for non-DC09 devices.

items.title: DC09 Alarm Log Entry Fields
items.description: Display comprehensive log fields for each DC09 alarm forward entry: Time, Alarm Code, DC09 Code, State, Account, Response, Encrypted, IP Address, Port, Area, Zone, Ack Time, Camera, Attachment. Entries are read-only.

items.title: DC09 Alarm Forward Logging
items.description: Log both successful and failed alarm forwarding attempts. Display encryption status, correct routing details, and near real-time log updates ordered by most recent first.

items.title: Mandatory Fields Validation in CMS Configuration
items.description: Fix validation to prevent saving CMS configuration when required fields (Company ID, API Token) are empty. Display clear error messages indicating which fields are required.

items.title: Inline Guidance for API Token and CMS Fields
items.description: Add inline guidance explaining where to generate API tokens in Talos, required permission scopes, and how to obtain DC09 Account IDs from the CMS.

items.title: Credential and Configuration Format Validation
items.description: Implement real-time validation for credential formats (Company ID, API Token) and network parameters (IP address, port). Block saving with invalid formats and display actionable error messages.

items.title: DC09 Account ID Required Validation
items.description: Block saving sites without DC09 Account ID when a DC09-based CMS is configured at tenant level and the site is intended to forward alarms.

items.title: DC09 Account ID Uniqueness Validation
items.description: Prevent duplicate DC09 Account ID assignment to multiple sites targeting the same CMS. Display clear guidance when duplicate is detected.

items.title: Encryption Key Format Validation
items.description: Implement validation for Encryption Key format. Block saving with invalid keys and provide clear error messages.

items.title: Encryption Usage Guidance
items.description: Add inline guidance explaining when encryption is required and how it affects alarm transmission and testing.

items.title: Block Duplicate CMS Configurations
items.description: Detect and prevent duplicate or contradictory CMS configurations at tenant level. Display clear validation message when conflict is detected.

items.title: Comprehensive Validation Error Handling
items.description: Ensure all validation errors must be resolved before saving. Display all errors together with clear, actionable messages indicating which fields are invalid and what corrections are required.

items.title: DC09 CMS Marketplace visibility and status display
items.description: Ensure DC09 CMS is visible in the Marketplace with correct status indicator

items.title: CMS required field validation
items.description: Prevent CMS from being saved without required fields

items.title: DC09 Account ID mandatory enforcement
items.description: Ensure Account ID is mandatory when a site forwards alarms to DC09 and site cannot be saved without it

items.title: DC09 alarm forwarding reliability
items.description: Ensure alarms are successfully forwarded to the DC09 CMS with correct account per site

items.title: DC09 encryption key handling
items.description: Ensure alarms are encrypted when encryption key is provided, and unencrypted when not

items.title: DC09 Alarm Forward Logs visibility
items.description: Ensure logs are visible on Device Dashboard with success/failure entries and near real-time updates

items.title: Outstream feature stability
items.description: Ensure Outstream feature loads without errors and Talos synchronization works correctly

items.title: Zone display correctness
items.description: Ensure zones are displayed correctly with all sensors visible per zone, no hidden or incorrectly merged sensors

items.title: Outstream data persistence on refresh
items.description: Ensure page refresh does not break data and site switching updates data correctly

items.title: Talos alarm reception in GCX
items.description: Verify alarms are received correctly from Talos in GCX

items.title: Auto streaming trigger reliability
items.description: Ensure alarms trigger auto streaming successfully and disabling prevents any streaming action

items.title: Zone-based streaming behavior
items.description: Ensure site-level and zone-based streaming work correctly with proper fallback for invalid zones

items.title: Zone change isolation
items.description: Ensure zone changes affect future alarms only, not existing ones

items.title: Camera streaming across devices
items.description: Ensure all cameras stream correctly for sites with single or multiple devices, and no streams start for sites without devices

items.title: Motion alarm quad view behavior
items.description: Ensure motion alarm opens quad automatically, even when viewing other cameras, with consistent behavior for repeated alarms

items.title: Alarm lifecycle quad workflow sync
items.description: Ensure canceling alarm closes quad and workflow, closing workflow closes quad, and reopening alarm opens quad again

items.title: Stream access permissions enforcement
items.description: Ensure unauthorized users cannot see or access streams and streaming UI is hidden for unauthorized roles

items.title: Streaming action audit logging
items.description: Ensure streaming actions, permission denials and failures are properly logged for compliance

items.title: Marketplace alarm management category visibility
items.description: Ensure Marketplace loads successfully with Alarm Management System category visible

items.title: CMS options listing completeness
items.description: Ensure all supported CMS options (Evalink Talos, Amwin, Lisa, Immix, Alice) are listed even when no CMS is configured

items.title: CMS state display accuracy
items.description: Ensure each CMS shows correct state (Not Configured/Configured)

items.title: CMS admin-only access control
items.description: Ensure only admin users can view and access CMS configuration

items.title: CMS overview page functionality
items.description: Ensure selecting a CMS opens overview page displaying supported alarm protocol, integration scope, and required configuration inputs

items.title: Talos-Salvo Alarm Workflow Integration
items.description: When a motion alarm is assigned, the alarm workflow automatically opens in Talos and the corresponding alarm quad loads in Salvo. Different toggle combinations control behavior: multi-monitor only, autostream only, or both enabled.

items.title: Zone-Based Alarm Handling
items.description: Burglar alarms handle zone configurations from both GCX and Talos. When an alarm includes zone data, the system matches against GCX zone configurations to stream only relevant sensors. Unmatched or missing zones fall back to site-level streaming.
